subject: HubSpot contact sync has data mapping errors
body: Contacts synced from HubSpot are showing up with first and last names swapped. Also, the company field is mapping to the phone number field. This is messing up our CRM view. We've checked the field mapping in settings and it looks correct on our end.
resolution: The HubSpot API changed their field key format in their latest update (firstname → first_name). Our mapping was using the old keys. Updated the field mapping configuration and added a validation layer for HubSpot API schema changes. Triggered a resync to correct the swapped fields.

subject: Search results include deleted items
body: When I search for contacts in the CRM module, I'm seeing contacts that were deleted weeks ago. They show up in search results but clicking on them gives a 404 error. This is confusing for our sales team who think these are active leads.
resolution: The search index wasn't being updated on soft-delete operations. The Elasticsearch index still contained documents with deleted_at timestamps. Ran a reindex job and added a filter to exclude soft-deleted records. Search results now clean.

subject: Dashboard takes 45+ seconds to load
body: Our main dashboard has become extremely slow. It's taking over 45 seconds to load, sometimes timing out completely. This started about a week ago. We have a lot of data (50,000+ tasks, 200 users) but it was fine before. Is something wrong on your end?
resolution: Investigated and found the customer's dashboard had 12 widgets, several with unindexed custom field filters. Two issues: 1) A database query was doing a full table scan (added index on custom_field_values), 2) Widget data wasn't being cached. Added Redis caching for dashboard widget data (5-min TTL). Load time reduced from 45s to 3s.

subject: Calculated fields returning #ERROR
body: Custom calculated fields in our project tracker are all showing #ERROR instead of values. These are simple formulas like SUM and AVERAGE across numeric columns. They were working fine until this morning. Affects all projects, not just one.
resolution: The formula evaluation engine was updated overnight and introduced a type coercion bug — numeric strings weren't being cast before arithmetic. Reverted the engine to the previous version and scheduled a proper fix. All calculated fields restored.

subject: Transfer account ownership to new admin
body: Our previous IT admin (jordan.smith@NovaTech Solutions) has left the company. I'm the new admin and need full ownership transferred to me (alex.chen@NovaTech Solutions). Jordan's account should be deactivated. What documentation do you need for this?
resolution: Account ownership transfer requires: 1) Written request from a company officer (sent form), 2) Domain verification (confirmed alex.chen@ matches account domain). Transfer completed. Jordan's account deactivated. All API keys regenerated as a security precaution.

subject: Google Calendar integration showing duplicate events
body: Every meeting scheduled in Steadfast is creating two events in Google Calendar. It's been happening for about a week. Deleting one copy deletes both. Our team's calendars are a mess with all these duplicates. We have 50+ meetings a week so this is a significant problem.
resolution: Root cause: a retry mechanism in the Google Calendar connector was not checking for idempotency. When the first API call succeeded but timed out, the retry created a duplicate. Added idempotency key to event creation requests. Cleaned up existing duplicates via batch API. Fix deployed in connector v1.9.2.

subject: Best practices for setting up workflows
body: We want to use Steadfast's workflow automation but need guidance on best practices. We have about 10 standard processes we want to automate — things like approval chains, task escalation, and notification rules. Where should I start? Any templates available?
resolution: Sent our Workflow Best Practices guide (KB-1030). Recommended starting with their simplest process to learn the builder. Shared 5 workflow templates: approval chain, task escalation, SLA notification, onboarding sequence, and review cycle. Key tip: test workflows in their sandbox workspace first. Offered a workflow design session.

subject: Can't export reports to PDF anymore
body: The PDF export feature on the reports page stopped working about a week ago. When I click 'Export to PDF' nothing happens — no download, no error message. I've tried Chrome and Firefox. Other export formats (CSV, XLSX) work fine. This was working before.
resolution: Root cause: the PDF rendering service (wkhtmltopdf) was failing silently after a dependency update. Logs showed a missing font package. Reinstalled fonts and restarted the rendering service. PDF exports now working. Added health check for the PDF service.

subject: Two-factor auth codes not being sent
body: Several of our users are not receiving their 2FA codes via SMS when trying to log in. We've verified the phone numbers are correct. This has been happening intermittently for the past 3 days. Some users are completely locked out.
resolution: SMS delivery issue traced to our Twilio integration — the sending number was flagged as spam by some carriers after a volume spike. Switched to a verified toll-free number and implemented retry logic with fallback to email-based 2FA. All affected users can now log in.

subject: How to import data from our old project management tool
body: We're migrating from Asana to Steadfast. We have about 2,000 tasks across 15 projects that need to come over. Is there an import tool? We also need to preserve assignees, due dates, and custom fields if possible. What format does the import expect?
resolution: Shared our migration guide (KB-1015). Three options: 1) CSV import (manual but flexible), 2) Asana direct import tool (Settings > Import > Asana), 3) API-based migration for full fidelity. Recommended option 2 for their volume. Custom field mapping supported for up to 20 fields. Offered migration assistance session.

subject: Dashboard charts not rendering on Firefox 125
body: Since updating to Firefox 125, none of the dashboard charts are rendering. Just blank white spaces where the charts should be. Works fine on Chrome. We have about 30 users on Firefox who are affected. Is this a known compatibility issue?
resolution: The dashboard export feature was failing on Chrome due to a Content-Security-Policy header blocking the PDF renderer. Updated the CSP to allow the export service domain. Dashboard exports should work on Chrome now.

subject: Requesting audit log for admin actions
body: For compliance purposes, we need a detailed audit log of all admin actions — user provisioning, permission changes, data exports, configuration changes. Currently there's no way to see who changed what and when. This is a requirement for our SOC 2 audit.
resolution: Feature request FR-2931. Audit logging is in development for Enterprise plan (target: end of Q2). Shared our current admin activity report (Settings > Admin > Activity) which covers user management actions but not all configuration changes. Recommended Enterprise upgrade for full audit trail when available.

subject: Salesforce sync stopped working after update
body: Our Salesforce integration hasn't synced any data since last Tuesday. We updated Salesforce to their Spring '25 release the day before. No errors showing in the integration dashboard but the last sync timestamp is stuck on March 4. We depend on this for our sales pipeline visibility.
resolution: Salesforce Spring '25 changed their OAuth token refresh flow. Our integration was using a deprecated endpoint. Updated the Salesforce connector to use the new token endpoint. Triggered a full resync. All records caught up within 2 hours. Added monitoring alert for sync staleness.

subject: Can't drag and drop tasks in board view
body: The kanban board view doesn't allow drag and drop anymore. When I try to move a task to a different column, it snaps back to its original position. This works in list view (I can change status there) but the board interaction is broken. Really frustrating.
resolution: A CSS z-index conflict with the new toolbar overlay was blocking pointer events on the drag layer. Fixed the stacking context. Also found and fixed a race condition where the optimistic UI update was being overwritten by a stale WebSocket message. Fix in v3.14.3.

subject: Need to enable IP allowlisting for our account
body: Our security team requires that we restrict access to Steadfast from specific IP ranges only. We need to allowlist our office IPs and VPN ranges. Is this possible? If so, how do we configure it? This is a requirement for our security compliance.
resolution: IP allowlisting is available on Enterprise plan. Settings: Admin > Security > IP Allowlist. Added customer's IP ranges: 203.0.113.0/24 (office), 198.51.100.0/24 (VPN). Note: ensure VPN IPs are included to avoid lockouts. Sent our IP restriction best practices doc (KB-2001).

subject: How to set up project templates
body: We run similar projects repeatedly and want to create templates so we don't have to set up tasks, milestones, and team assignments from scratch each time. How do I create and use project templates?
resolution: Walked through project template creation: Projects > Templates > Create Template. Can save: task structure, assignments (as role-based), custom fields, milestones, and workflow automations. Shared our Template Library (12 pre-built templates). Helped create 2 custom templates for their recurring project types.
suspect_reason: A how-to question about setting up project templates is a routine informational request and clearly not critical priority.

subject: Looking for training materials for our end users
body: We're rolling out Steadfast to 200 users next month and want to prepare training materials. Do you have any training videos, guides, or a certification program? We'd also like to set up a sandbox environment for people to practice in before going live.
resolution: Shared resources: 1) Steadfast Academy (academy.steadfast.io) — free self-paced courses, 2) Video library (15 how-to videos), 3) Quick-start PDF guide for end users. Sandbox: enabled a training workspace on their account (Settings > Sandbox > Enable). Valid for 30 days with sample data. Also offered a custom training webinar for their team.

subject: Date picker showing wrong month on first click
body: When I click on any date picker field, it opens to January 2020 instead of the current month. I have to manually scroll forward to get to the right month. This happens everywhere — task due dates, filter date ranges, report parameters. Minor but really annoying.
resolution: The date picker library (react-datepicker) initialization was using a stale default. Updated the defaultDate prop to use Date.now(). Verified across all 14 date picker instances in the app. Shipped in v3.14.1.

subject: Request to merge two duplicate accounts
body: We somehow ended up with two separate Steadfast accounts — one from when our marketing team signed up independently and one from our IT-managed deployment. Can these be merged? We want to consolidate under the IT-managed account and migrate the marketing team's projects.
resolution: Account merge is a manual process. Initiated merge request (MERGE-0891). Plan: export marketing account projects, import into IT account, redirect SSO. Timeline: 3-5 business days. Sent pre-merge checklist for customer to verify data before migration.

subject: Can't reset password — reset link not working
body: I requested a password reset but when I click the link in the email, it says 'This link has expired.' I've tried three times and each time the link expires immediately. I need to get into my account urgently. I've verified the link URL looks correct.
resolution: The user was unable to update their email address because the email change confirmation was being sent to the old email which was no longer accessible. Verified identity through alternative means and manually updated the email address. User can now manage their account with the new email.

subject: API rate limit too low for our use case
body: We're hitting the 100 requests/minute API rate limit constantly. Our integration syncs data bidirectionally and needs at least 500 req/min during peak hours. We've already optimized our batching. Can the limit be raised or can we get a higher-tier API plan?
resolution: Reviewed usage patterns. Increased rate limit to 300 req/min for their account (max for Growth plan). Recommended Enterprise plan for 1000 req/min limit. Also identified 3 API calls in their integration that could be replaced with a single batch endpoint to reduce volume by ~60%.

subject: Request for Gantt chart view
body: We use Steadfast for project management but really need a Gantt chart view to visualize project timelines and dependencies. Currently we export to MS Project for this which is clunky. Having it native in Steadfast would streamline our workflow significantly.
resolution: Feature request FR-2923. Gantt view has been our #2 most requested feature. Currently in development, expected beta in Q2. Added to the notification list. Shared a third-party Gantt integration (ChartGantt) that works with our API as a stopgap.

subject: Report generation taking over 5 minutes
body: Running our monthly analytics report used to take about 30 seconds. Now it's taking over 5 minutes and sometimes fails with a timeout. The report covers all projects for the past month. We need this for our monthly executive review and it's becoming unreliable.
resolution: Report query was joining across 6 tables without proper indexing on the date range filters. Added composite indexes for the most common report queries. Also implemented report result caching — recurring reports with the same parameters serve from cache. Report generation time back to ~30s. Added a progress indicator for long-running reports.

subject: Need to add 15 new team members
body: We're onboarding a new department and need to add 15 users to our account. Can you walk me through the bulk user creation process? Also, what permission groups should I set up? We want them to have access to projects but not billing or admin settings.
resolution: Walked through bulk user invite process (Settings > Team > Bulk Invite via CSV). Recommended creating a 'Department-Standard' permission group with project access but restricted billing/admin. Sent our permission group template guide. All 15 users successfully invited.

subject: Mobile app extremely sluggish on Android
body: The Steadfast Android app has become nearly unusable in the last few updates. Scrolling through task lists is choppy, transitions are laggy, and the app crashes when opening large projects (100+ tasks). We have Pixel 7 phones (plenty of RAM). iOS version works fine.
resolution: Identified a memory leak in the Android list virtualization component introduced in v2.14.0. The task list was rendering all items instead of virtualizing the viewport. Fix deployed in v2.14.2: proper RecyclerView implementation with view recycling. Also reduced the initial data fetch size for large projects. Memory usage down 60%.

subject: Dashboard shows wrong numbers since yesterday
body: Our analytics dashboard has been showing completely wrong numbers since yesterday morning. Revenue figures are about 3x what they should be. Multiple team members are seeing the same thing. We rely on this for daily standups. This is really disruptive.
resolution: Identified a data aggregation bug introduced in v3.14.2 (deployed March 10). The revenue rollup was double-counting transactions with multiple line items. Hotfix deployed in v3.14.3. Dashboard numbers now correct. Verified with customer.

subject: Incorrect charge on our last invoice
body: Hi team, we noticed an extra charge of $450 on our March invoice (INV-2024-3391). We're on the Growth plan and this amount doesn't match our expected billing. Can you look into this? Our finance team needs this resolved before end of quarter. Thanks, Luminos AI.
resolution: Reviewed invoice INV-2024-3391. Found a proration charge from mid-cycle seat addition on Feb 14. Sent updated breakdown to customer. No credit needed — charge is correct but poorly labeled. Updated invoice description for clarity.

subject: Account locked after too many login attempts
body: My account got locked after entering the wrong password too many times (I recently changed it). I can't access the password reset because my email on file is my old work email. I need to get back in ASAP — I have a client presentation in 2 hours.
resolution: Identity verified via security questions and account ownership confirmation (matching company domain + role). Unlocked account and sent password reset to verified alternate email. Updated primary email on file. Recommended enabling SSO to avoid future lockouts.

subject: Suspicious login attempts on admin account
body: We're seeing failed login attempts on our admin account from unfamiliar IP addresses. The attempts are happening at odd hours (2-4 AM our time) from IPs in countries where we don't operate. Want to make sure our account hasn't been compromised and understand what protections are in place.
resolution: Reviewed login audit log. Found 23 failed attempts from 5 IPs over the past week — all blocked by rate limiting. No successful unauthorized logins. Recommended: 1) Enable 2FA on all admin accounts immediately, 2) Enable IP allowlisting, 3) Rotate admin password. Added the suspicious IPs to our global blocklist. Escalated to security team for monitoring.

subject: Email notifications arriving with wrong timestamps
body: All our email notifications from Steadfast show timestamps that are 5 hours ahead. We're in EST but the emails show times in what looks like UTC. This started happening about two weeks ago. Our team is getting confused about when events actually occurred.
resolution: Bug in notification service: timezone was hardcoded to UTC after a refactor in v3.12.0 instead of reading from the account's timezone setting. Fix deployed in v3.14.1. Notifications now respect account timezone. Existing queued notifications flushed and regenerated.

subject: Pagination broken on team member list
body: Our organization has 340 team members. The team management page only shows the first 50 and the 'Next' button doesn't work — it refreshes the same page. I can't access members beyond page 1. This makes user management impossible for us.
resolution: Pagination offset was being reset to 0 on each navigation due to a state management bug in the React component. Fixed the useEffect dependency array. Also increased default page size to 100. Deployed in v3.14.2.

subject: Search returning stale results — showing old data
body: When I search for tasks, the results show task titles and descriptions from days ago, not the current values. For example, I renamed a task yesterday but the old name shows in search. If I click through, the task shows the correct current name. It's like the search index is outdated.
resolution: The search indexing service was failing to process new documents due to an Elasticsearch cluster disk space issue. Freed up disk space, restarted the indexing service, and queued a full reindex. New content should be searchable immediately. Added disk space monitoring.

subject: API response times have doubled in the last week
body: Our API integration is experiencing significant latency increases. Average response time went from ~200ms to ~500ms across all endpoints. This is impacting our real-time sync. We haven't changed anything on our end. Is there a platform-wide performance issue?
resolution: Correlated with a database migration that was running during off-peak hours but bleeding into business hours. The migration was rebalancing table partitions. Paused the migration during business hours (9 AM - 6 PM ET) and scheduled completion for weekend. API latency back to normal (~200ms). Will monitor during next maintenance window.

subject: Webhook payloads missing customer_id field
body: Since your last update, the webhook payloads for 'invoice.paid' events no longer include the customer_id field. Our integration relies on this field to match payments to our internal records. This is breaking our automated reconciliation process.
resolution: Confirmed regression introduced in API v2.8.0. The customer_id field was inadvertently removed during a payload schema migration. Restored the field and added it to the API contract tests. Patch released in v2.8.1. Backfilled missed webhooks for the last 48 hours.

subject: Tax exemption certificate not being applied
body: We submitted our tax exemption certificate three months ago but our invoices still show sales tax. We're a registered nonprofit and shouldn't be charged tax. This has been an ongoing issue. Can you escalate this?
resolution: Found the tax exemption certificate was uploaded but not linked to the billing profile due to a mismatch in EIN. Corrected the linking. Applied retroactive tax credits for the last 3 invoices totaling $847.22. Future invoices will reflect exempt status.

subject: Zapier trigger not firing for new tasks
body: We have a Zapier automation that should trigger when a new task is created in Steadfast. It worked initially but stopped firing about a month ago. Our Zap history shows no triggers. The Zap is turned on and connected. Other Zaps (not connected to Steadfast) work fine.
resolution: The webhook subscription for their Zap had expired (30-day TTL on unauthenticated webhooks). Resubscribed the webhook and recommended they use our authenticated webhook option (requires API key in header) which doesn't expire. Also filed ENG-4488 to extend unauthenticated webhook TTL.

subject: Bulk operations timing out
body: Trying to do bulk updates on 500+ tasks (changing status, assigning to team) and the operation times out every time. The loading spinner goes for about 2 minutes then I get a gateway timeout error. Doing them one by one would take hours. Need this fixed urgently.
resolution: Bulk operations over 200 items were hitting the 120s timeout on the API gateway. Two fixes: 1) Changed bulk operations to async processing (job queue) with progress tracking, 2) Increased batch size per API call from 50 to 200. Customer can now bulk-update 500 tasks in ~15s. Job status visible in Settings > Background Jobs.

subject: Confused about workspace vs project structure
body: I'm trying to organize our company in Steadfast but I'm confused about the hierarchy. What's the difference between a workspace, a space, and a project? We have 4 departments each with multiple teams. How should I structure this? Don't want to set it up wrong and have to redo everything.
resolution: Explained the hierarchy: Workspace (company-level) > Spaces (departments) > Projects (team/initiative-level). For their setup: 4 spaces for departments, projects within each for ongoing initiatives. Sent our 'Workspace Architecture Guide' (KB-1008). Recommended starting with one department as a pilot.

subject: Locked out after too many password attempts
body: I tried logging in this morning and after 5 attempts my account got locked. I think I was using my old password. The lockout message says to contact support to unlock. Can you please unlock my account? My email is patricia.wu@company.com. I have meetings in an hour that I need to prepare for.
resolution: Verified identity via security questions and account email ownership. Account unlocked. Sent password reset link to verified email. Recommended enabling SSO or using a password manager to prevent future lockouts. Account lockout policy: 5 failed attempts = 30 min lockout or admin unlock.
suspect_reason: An account lockout due to forgotten password is an account access issue, not a security category ticket; it requires no security investigation.

subject: Automated reports sending to wrong recipients
body: Our scheduled weekly report that should go to the management team (distribution list: mgmt@ClearEdge Financial) is being sent to individual contributors instead. We noticed this started after we updated our team structure last week. Some sensitive data may have been exposed to the wrong people.
resolution: The report distribution logic was caching the recipient list and not invalidating on team structure changes. Cleared the cache and added cache-busting on team membership updates. Verified correct recipients for next scheduled send. Recommended customer review who received the misrouted reports.

subject: REST API returning 429 errors during peak hours
body: We're getting 429 (Too Many Requests) errors from your API between 9-11 AM when our team is most active. We're making about 200 requests per minute across our integration services. The rate limit headers show a 100/min limit. This is blocking our automated workflows.
resolution: Current rate limit for Growth plan is 100 req/min. Analyzed their usage pattern and found redundant polling that could be replaced with webhooks. Helped restructure to use webhooks for real-time events and reduce API polling to 40 req/min. Also applied a temporary rate limit bump to 200/min while they implement changes.

subject: Question about enterprise pricing tiers
body: We're evaluating whether to upgrade from Growth to Enterprise. Can you send over the current Enterprise pricing structure? Specifically interested in volume discounts for 500+ seats and what's included in the Enterprise SLA. Thanks!
resolution: Sent Enterprise pricing sheet (v2024-Q4). Key points: $38/seat/month at 500+ seats, 99.95% SLA, dedicated CSM, priority support queue. Looped in sales (Sarah K.) for a deeper pricing conversation.

subject: Need to update payment method
body: Our corporate card on file is expiring next month. I need to switch to a new card but the billing settings page keeps timing out when I try to save. I've tried three different browsers. Can someone help me update this before our next billing cycle?
resolution: Confirmed the payment update form has a known issue with cards requiring 3DS verification. Walked customer through the alternative update flow via Settings > Billing > Manual Update. Card updated successfully.

subject: CSV import timing out with large files
body: Trying to import a CSV file with 50,000 rows (about 15MB) and it times out every time after about 3 minutes. We need to do this import for our data migration. Smaller files (under 1,000 rows) import fine. Is there a file size or row limit we're hitting?
resolution: The CSV export was failing due to a formatting issue with special characters in the data. Updated the export service to properly escape special characters and handle UTF-8 encoding. CSV exports should now download correctly with proper formatting.

subject: Getting rate limited on /v2/reports endpoint
body: We're hitting 429 errors specifically on the /v2/reports endpoint when generating our daily analytics reports. Other endpoints are fine. We're only making about 10 requests per minute to this endpoint. The error started yesterday.
resolution: The rate limit on /v1/exports was temporarily reduced during a backend migration. We've restored the original limits and your export requests should go through without hitting 429 errors. Let us know if the issue persists.
suspect_reason: The resolution references fixing limits on '/v1/exports' but the ticket reports 429 errors on '/v2/reports', suggesting a mismatch in the resolution, but more clearly the priority is high while the issue (rate limiting on one endpoint, only 10 req/min) is more consistent with medium priority given no data loss or outage.

subject: Question about data retention after downgrade
body: We're considering downgrading from Enterprise to Growth. What happens to our data? Specifically: archived projects, custom fields, and integration configurations. Will we lose anything? Need to understand the full impact before making a decision.
resolution: Detailed the downgrade impact: archived projects remain accessible (read-only for those exceeding Growth limits), custom fields preserved but limited to 20 (currently using 34), integrations limited to 5 active (currently 12). Sent full comparison doc. Recommended exporting before downgrade as a safety measure.

subject: Custom dashboard widgets
body: The default dashboard layout doesn't quite fit our workflow. We'd love to be able to create custom widgets — like a KPI tracker that pulls specific metrics, or a team workload heatmap. Configurable dashboards would be a huge value-add for us.
resolution: Feature request FR-2917. Custom dashboards are in active development (alpha internally). Added to early access list. In the meantime, suggested using the embedded analytics iframe option with their BI tool.

subject: Cancellation and final billing inquiry
body: We've decided to move to a different platform. Please process our cancellation effective end of this billing cycle. Also need confirmation of what our final invoice will look like — we don't want any surprise charges after cancellation.
resolution: Processed cancellation request. Account set to downgrade at cycle end (2025-04-01). Final invoice will include usage through March 31 only. No early termination fee on monthly plan. Sent confirmation email with detailed final invoice preview.

subject: Can we get a walkthrough of the reporting features?
body: Our team wants to better understand the reporting capabilities in Steadfast. We're not using reports much right now but our management wants regular project status updates. Can someone give us a tour of what's available?
resolution: Scheduled a 30-minute reporting walkthrough. Covered: built-in report templates, custom report builder, scheduled report delivery, and dashboard widgets. Shared our Reporting Best Practices guide (KB-1060). Customer set up 3 recurring reports.
suspect_reason: A request for a product walkthrough of reporting features is a low-urgency how-to question, not a high-priority issue.

subject: Setting up SSO for our organization
body: We'd like to enable SSO using our company's Azure AD. I've read the docs but I'm getting stuck on the SAML configuration — specifically the assertion consumer service URL and the entity ID. Can someone help me get this configured?
resolution: Scheduled a 30-minute screen share to walk through SSO setup. Key settings: ACS URL is https://app.steadfast.io/auth/saml/callback, Entity ID is https://app.steadfast.io/saml/metadata. Helped configure attribute mappings (email, firstName, lastName, department). SSO working after the call. Sent config doc for reference.

subject: Discount code not applying at checkout
body: Trying to apply the promo code GROW2024 that your sales rep gave us, but it says 'invalid code' at checkout. We were promised 20% off the first year. Can you apply this manually? We want to complete our upgrade today.
resolution: Code GROW2024 expired on 2024-12-31. Contacted sales rep (James M.) who confirmed the offer should be honored. Created new code GROW2024-EXT with same terms, valid through 2025-03-31. Customer applied successfully.

subject: Where to find keyboard shortcuts documentation
body: Is there a list of keyboard shortcuts for Steadfast? I'd like to work faster without using the mouse so much. I found a couple shortcuts by accident (Ctrl+K for search) but want to know all of them.
resolution: Shared keyboard shortcut reference (available in-app via ? key). Full list also at docs.steadfast.io/shortcuts. Key shortcuts: Ctrl+K (search), Ctrl+N (new task), Ctrl+Shift+L (list view), Ctrl+Shift+B (board view). Also mentioned the command palette feature.
suspect_reason: A simple question about where to find keyboard shortcuts documentation is clearly low priority, not high.

subject: Would love a dark mode option
body: We have several developers on our team who work late hours and the bright white interface is tough on the eyes. Is there any plan to add a dark mode? Even a simple theme toggle would be great. Several of our team members have asked about this.
resolution: Logged as feature request FR-2891. Dark mode is on the Q3 roadmap (currently in design phase). Added customer to the beta notification list. Shared the public roadmap link for tracking.

subject: SSO authentication issues this week
body: We've been experiencing intermittent SSO login failures since Monday. About 30% of login attempts fail with a redirect loop. Our Okta configuration hasn't changed. Clearing cookies helps temporarily but the issue returns. Affecting all our teams.
resolution: Traced to a session cookie conflict between the SSO redirect and the app session handler. Updated the cookie domain scope and added a cache-busting parameter to the SSO callback URL. Login success rate back to 99.9%.

subject: Double-charged for last two months
body: We've been double-charged for both January and February. Our bank shows two identical withdrawals of $2,340 each month. This is urgent — it's affecting our cash flow. Please investigate and process refunds immediately.
resolution: Investigated with payment processor. Root cause: duplicate webhook from Stripe during a retry window. Two refunds of $2,340 processed (REF-9912, REF-9913). Added idempotency check to prevent recurrence. ENG-4502 filed.

subject: Requesting a copy of our annual contract
body: Hi, I'm the new finance director at Frostbyte Gaming. I need a copy of our current annual contract for an internal audit. Could you send over the signed agreement and any amendments? We also need confirmation of our current per-seat pricing.
resolution: Sent signed contract (executed 2024-01-15) and Amendment #1 (2024-06-01) via secure link. Confirmed current pricing: $45/seat/month on Growth annual plan, 120 seats.

subject: Team members can't see shared projects after joining
body: I've invited several new team members but they're saying they can't see any of the shared projects. I've added them to the team but projects aren't showing up. What am I missing? Do I need to add them to each project individually?
resolution: Newly invited members need to be added to the appropriate permission group that has project access. Default 'Member' role has no project access. Steps: Settings > Teams > Select team > Add to permission group with project visibility. Also recommended setting up auto-assignment rules so new members inherit the right access. Sent KB-1022.

subject: File upload silently fails for files over 10MB
body: Trying to upload customer contracts (PDF, typically 15-25MB) and the upload appears to complete but the file never shows up in the document list. No error message. Smaller files under 10MB upload fine. We've tried multiple file types. Evergreen SaaS needs this for our document management workflow.
resolution: The upload proxy had a 10MB body limit that wasn't surfaced to the UI. Increased limit to 50MB and added proper error messaging for files exceeding the limit. Also added a progress indicator for large uploads. Config: nginx client_max_body_size updated.

subject: Data encryption at rest question
body: For our SOC 2 compliance audit, we need documentation of how Steadfast encrypts data at rest. Specifically: encryption algorithm, key management process, and whether we can bring our own encryption keys (BYOK). Our auditors need this within 2 weeks.
resolution: Sent our Security Whitepaper (v2024-Q4) which covers: AES-256 encryption at rest, AWS KMS for key management with automatic key rotation, envelope encryption for database fields. BYOK is available on Enterprise plan (requires setup call). Also sent our SOC 2 Type II report and CAIQ. Offered a call with our security team for auditor questions.

subject: Search is unusably slow with large datasets
body: Global search across our workspace takes 15-20 seconds to return results. We have about 100,000 records. The search used to be instant when we had fewer records. At this point it's faster to manually browse than to search. Is there a way to speed this up?
resolution: The search index for the customer's workspace hadn't been rebalanced after a data migration. Triggered a search index rebuild (Elasticsearch reindex). Also enabled the search query cache for their workspace. Search time reduced to ~1s for most queries. Recommended using search filters to narrow scope for even faster results.

subject: First time setting up — need guidance
body: Hi, we just signed up for Steadfast last week and I'm the admin responsible for getting everything set up. Feeling a bit overwhelmed. We have about 80 users to onboard. Where should I start? Is there a recommended setup sequence?
resolution: Sent our Admin Onboarding Checklist (KB-1001). Recommended sequence: 1) Configure workspace settings, 2) Set up permission groups, 3) Create project templates, 4) Invite pilot group (5-10 users), 5) Run pilot for 1 week, 6) Full rollout. Offered a free onboarding call with our CS team. Scheduled for Thursday.

subject: CSV export has wrong data in some columns
body: When we export our project data to CSV, some columns have incorrect data. Specifically, the 'assignee' column shows user IDs instead of names, and the 'status' column is blank for about 20% of rows. The data looks correct in the app. Export format seems broken.
resolution: Two issues found: 1) The CSV serializer was using raw field values instead of display values for lookup fields (assignee). Fixed the serializer to resolve foreign keys. 2) Status was blank for tasks using custom statuses (not mapped in the export template). Added custom status mapping. Both fixed in v3.14.2.

subject: Need to set up role-based access control
body: We're restructuring our Steadfast permissions and need to implement proper RBAC. We have 5 distinct roles: Admin, Manager, Team Lead, Contributor, and Viewer. Each should have different access levels to projects, reports, and settings. How do I set this up?
resolution: Walked through RBAC setup: Admin > Permissions > Custom Roles. Created 5 role definitions with specific permission sets. Key permissions configured: project CRUD, report access, settings management, user management, billing access. Sent our RBAC configuration template. Recommended quarterly reviews of role assignments.

subject: Can we get a breakdown of our usage statistics?
body: For our quarterly vendor review, we need detailed usage statistics for our Steadfast account: active users, tasks created, projects active, storage used, API call volume. Is there a dashboard or report for this?
resolution: Generated a custom usage report from Admin > Analytics > Account Usage. Included: 487 active users (of 500 seats), 12,340 tasks created this quarter, 89 active projects, 45GB storage used, 1.2M API calls. Exported as PDF and CSV. Set up quarterly auto-report delivery to their admin email.

subject: General question about feature availability
body: Quick question — is the time tracking feature available on our plan? We'd like to start using it for our team's project work but I'm not sure if it's included or if we need to upgrade.
resolution: Time tracking is available on Growth and Enterprise plans. Customer is on Growth — directed to Settings > Features > Time Tracking to enable. Sent KB-1090 time tracking guide.

subject: Where can I find the API documentation?
body: Hi, we're new to Steadfast and our developers want to start building integrations. Where can I find the API documentation? I've looked through the help center but can't find comprehensive API docs. We need to understand the endpoints, authentication, and rate limits before we start building.
resolution: API documentation is at docs.steadfast.io/api. Shared direct links to: Authentication guide, REST API reference, Webhook documentation, Rate limiting details, and SDKs (Python, Node.js, Ruby). Also shared our Getting Started with the API tutorial (KB-1050) and invited them to our developer Slack community.

subject: User permissions audit for compliance review
body: We need to conduct a quarterly permissions audit. Is there a way to export a report showing all users, their roles, and what they have access to? We need this for both our internal audit and our upcoming ISO 27001 certification.
resolution: Admin > Reports > User Access Report generates the needed export. Includes: username, role, permission groups, project access, last login date. Export as CSV or PDF. For ISO 27001, also sent our access control documentation (KB-2015) and offered to provide our ISO 27001 certification letter (we're certified through 2025-09).

subject: AWS S3 backup integration failing silently
body: We configured the S3 backup integration last month but just realized no backups have actually been created. The integration status shows 'active' but the S3 bucket is empty. We need reliable backups for compliance. Can you investigate?
resolution: The S3 integration was failing on the PutObject call due to a bucket policy that required server-side encryption (SSE-KMS) but our integration was using SSE-S3. Updated the backup service to respect the customer's bucket encryption settings. First backup completed successfully. Added monitoring for backup job failures.

subject: Multi-language support for customer portal
body: We operate in 12 countries and our customer-facing portal needs to support multiple languages. Currently everything is English-only. At minimum we need Spanish, French, German, and Japanese. Is i18n on your roadmap?
resolution: Feature request FR-2945. Internationalization is a major initiative planned for H2 2025. Spanish and French are first priorities. Added customer to the i18n advisory group for input on translation priorities. Shared API option for custom label overrides as a partial workaround.

subject: Webhook retry logic doesn't exist
body: We're using webhooks to sync Steadfast events to our internal system. When our endpoint is temporarily down, the webhook events are just lost — there's no retry logic. We missed critical updates last week during a 10-minute outage. We need automatic retries with exponential backoff.
resolution: Currently webhooks are fire-and-forget with no retry logic. Feature request FR-2970 logged for webhook retry with exponential backoff and dead letter queue. Workaround: use our event polling API endpoint (GET /v2/events?since=timestamp) as a fallback to catch missed webhooks. Also recommended implementing a queue on their side to buffer events.

subject: Report generation has slowed significantly
body: Our custom analytics reports used to generate in about 30 seconds. Now they're taking 5-10 minutes. We run these reports daily for our executive team. The slowdown seems to correlate with the amount of data — our dataset has grown to about 200,000 records. Need this resolved.
resolution: The report query was hitting a full table scan on a table that grew past the query planner's statistics threshold. Updated table statistics and added a covering index for the most common report filters. Report generation back to ~30s for standard reports.

subject: Wrong amount on our latest invoice
body: Our latest invoice shows $3,200 but our contract says $2,800/month. I've checked our user count and nothing has changed. This needs to be corrected before our accounts payable processes it. Can you send a revised invoice?
resolution: Reviewed invoice INV-2025-1102. Discrepancy was caused by a mid-cycle addon (advanced analytics module) added on Feb 15. Prorated charge of $400 is correct. Sent itemized breakdown. Customer confirmed the addon was authorized by their CTO.

subject: Login failures continue — SSO redirect problem
body: Following up on our SSO issue from last month. The problem has returned — users are hitting redirect loops when logging in through SSO. This time it's affecting about half our users. We implemented your previous suggestion of clearing cookies but it's not a sustainable fix.
resolution: Root cause identified as a race condition in the SAML assertion validation when multiple users authenticate simultaneously. Implemented a lock mechanism on the assertion consumer service. Also added connection pooling for the SSO validation service. Issue resolved, monitoring closely.
suspect_reason: An SSO redirect loop causing login failures is an authentication/access issue, not a security incident; it should be categorized under authentication or technical support rather than security.

subject: Webhook notifications to Slack are delayed by hours
body: Our Slack webhook integration is delivering notifications with a 2-4 hour delay. Events happen in Steadfast and the Slack messages don't arrive until hours later. We depend on real-time alerts for our operations team. This has been going on for about a week.
resolution: The Zapier webhook authentication was failing due to an expired API key. Regenerated the API key and updated the Zapier trigger configuration. Webhook events to Zapier should now be processed immediately without authentication failures.

subject: Slack notifications not posting to the right channel
body: We configured Slack notifications to post to #ops-alerts but they're going to #general instead. We've reconfigured it twice and it reverts each time. This is causing noise in our general channel and our ops team is missing critical alerts.
resolution: Found a bug where the Slack channel selector was saving the channel name but not the channel ID. When Slack's API resolved the name, it was matching a different #general channel from a shared workspace. Fix: updated integration to store and use channel ID. Reconfigured correctly.

subject: Page loads are incredibly slow lately
body: For the past week, every page in Steadfast takes between 30-45 seconds to load. Sometimes it just spins forever and we have to refresh. It's not our internet — everything else is fast. Our whole team of 50 people is affected. This is really impacting our productivity.
resolution: Customer's workspace was hitting a database query bottleneck due to unoptimized custom field filters. Added index on the custom_fields join table. Also enabled CDN caching for static assets on their workspace. Load times reduced from 30-45s to 2-3s.

subject: Need help understanding our billing cycle
body: Can you explain how our billing cycle works? We signed up mid-month and I'm confused about whether we get prorated for the first month or if we're charged for the full month.
resolution: Billing is prorated for the first month based on signup date. Subsequent months are full charges on the 1st. Sent detailed billing FAQ and invoice breakdown for their first month.
suspect_reason: A billing question asking for an explanation of the billing cycle is clearly a billing/account inquiry, not a bug.

subject: Export problems persist — data sync issue?
body: We're still having problems with data exports from Steadfast. This time the CSV export includes records that shouldn't be there — we're seeing tasks from other projects bleeding into our export. We're exporting Project Alpha but getting tasks from Project Beta too. This could be a data isolation problem.
resolution: The export filter was not properly scoping to the selected project when custom views were applied. The view filter and the export filter were being OR'd instead of AND'd. Fixed the query builder to properly intersect filters. Verified export isolation across all the customer's projects.
suspect_reason: The ticket describes a data export bug with potential data isolation issues, not an integration problem; it should be categorized as a bug or data/export issue.

subject: Need help setting up Jira two-way sync
body: We want to set up a two-way sync between Steadfast tasks and Jira issues. Specifically: when a task is created in Steadfast with the 'engineering' tag, it should create a Jira issue, and status changes should sync both ways. What's the best approach?
resolution: Walked through the Jira integration setup: 1) Install Steadfast Jira plugin from Atlassian Marketplace, 2) Configure project mapping (Steadfast projects → Jira projects), 3) Set up field mappings and sync rules, 4) Enable bidirectional status sync. Sent detailed setup guide. Note: two-way sync requires Growth plan or higher.

subject: Not receiving email notifications for task assignments
body: Our team has stopped receiving email notifications when they're assigned to tasks. Notification settings are all enabled. We've checked spam folders — nothing there. This started about a week ago. We rely heavily on email notifications since not everyone checks the app regularly.
resolution: The customer's email domain was being rate-limited by our email service provider (SendGrid) due to a shared IP reputation issue. Moved the customer's notifications to a dedicated IP pool. Also found that 12 email addresses had hard-bounced and were being suppressed. Cleaned the suppression list after verifying the addresses were valid.
suspect_reason: Missing email notifications for task assignments is a notification/email delivery issue, not an integration issue.

subject: Would be great to have recurring tasks
body: We have many tasks that repeat on a weekly or monthly basis — status reports, server checks, client check-ins. Right now we manually create these each time. A recurring task feature with customizable schedules would save us significant time.
resolution: Feature request FR-2938. Recurring tasks are on the roadmap for Q3. As a workaround, shared our Zapier integration template that creates tasks on a schedule using Zapier's recurring trigger. Not ideal but functional in the interim.

subject: Potential data breach — unauthorized access detected
body: Our security monitoring detected successful logins from an IP address in Romania that doesn't belong to any of our employees. The account accessed appears to have downloaded several project files containing client PII. This may be a data breach and we need to contain it immediately.
resolution: Escalated to Tier 2 security team immediately. Actions taken: 1) Suspended the compromised account, 2) Revoked all active sessions for the workspace, 3) Enabled forced password reset for all users, 4) Provided access logs for the suspicious IP. Preliminary analysis: credentials likely obtained via phishing. Provided breach notification template and timeline for the customer's legal team.

subject: API returning 500 error on POST /v2/tasks
body: Our integration is getting consistent 500 Internal Server Error responses when calling POST /v2/tasks. The request body is valid JSON matching your API spec. Started about 2 hours ago. GET requests work fine. This is blocking our automated task creation pipeline.
resolution: The GET /v2/reports endpoint was returning 500 errors due to a database connection pool exhaustion issue during peak hours. Increased the connection pool size from 20 to 50 and added connection timeout handling. The reports endpoint is responding normally now.

subject: Reports crashing with timeout error
body: Following up on our slow reports issue. It's gotten worse — now reports are crashing completely with a 'Request Timeout' error after about 5 minutes. We can't generate any of our standard reports. This is our second time reporting this issue and it's impacting our daily operations. We need a permanent fix, not a band-aid.
resolution: The previous index fix addressed the symptom but not the root cause. The report engine was loading entire result sets into memory. Refactored to stream results and paginate the aggregation. Also increased the gateway timeout from 300s to 600s for report endpoints. Reports now complete reliably in under 60s regardless of dataset size.

subject: Critical integration failure disrupting our supply chain
body: Our Steadfast-to-SAP integration that drives our supply chain scheduling has been failing for the past 4 hours. Every minute this is down, we're accumulating delays in manufacturing orders. We're an Enterprise customer with an SLA and this is a P1 issue for us. Need someone on this NOW.
resolution: P1 escalation. SAP connector was failing due to an expired OAuth token that wasn't auto-refreshing. Root cause: a certificate rotation on the customer's SAP instance invalidated the stored credentials. Helped reconfigure the OAuth flow with new certificates. Backfilled 4 hours of missed sync events. Full pipeline restored in 47 minutes. Post-incident review scheduled.

subject: Email alerts missing again — different issue this time
body: Email notifications have stopped working AGAIN. Last time you said it was a SendGrid issue and it was fixed. But now it's back and it's different — we're receiving some notifications but not others. Specifically, task assignment emails work but comment notifications and due date reminders don't come through at all.
resolution: The notification service had a queue processing bug where only 'high priority' events (task assignments) were being processed during high load, while 'normal priority' events (comments, reminders) were being dropped. Fixed the queue consumer to process all priority levels. Also added dead letter queue for failed notifications with retry logic.

subject: Need to export our project data for a board meeting
body: I need to export a comprehensive project status report for our board of directors meeting next Friday. Need it as a PDF with charts showing progress, timeline, and budget utilization. Is there a built-in way to do this?
resolution: Guided through Reports > Executive Summary template. Customized with their specific project data, added Gantt chart and budget utilization views. Exported as PDF. Also set up a recurring monthly export for future board meetings. Sent formatting guide for executive reports.

subject: Request for custom branding on our workspace
body: We'd like to add our company logo and brand colors to our Steadfast workspace. Is this possible? Just cosmetic changes — logo in the header and our brand blue (#003366) as the accent color.
resolution: Custom branding is available on Enterprise plan. Settings > Workspace > Branding. Uploaded customer's logo and configured accent color. Changes visible to all workspace users within 5 minutes.
suspect_reason: A cosmetic branding customization request (logo and accent color) has no business-critical urgency and critical priority is clearly unwarranted.

subject: Need ability to bulk-assign tasks
body: Currently I have to assign tasks one at a time. With 200+ tasks to reassign during our team restructure, this is extremely tedious. A bulk selection and assign feature would save us hours. Even a CSV import for assignments would work.
resolution: Feature request logged as FR-2904. Bulk operations are a priority for Q2. As a workaround, shared our API endpoint for batch task updates (POST /v2/tasks/batch) which can be used with a simple script. Sent example code.

subject: Mobile push notifications arriving hours late
body: Push notifications on the mobile app are arriving 3-6 hours after the actual event. I get notified about task assignments and comments way after they happened. My notification settings are correct and I have all alerts enabled. Android phone, latest app version.
resolution: The email notification service was backed up due to a queue processing bottleneck. Scaled up the email worker pool from 2 to 8 instances and cleared the backlog. Email notifications should now arrive within minutes of the triggering event.

subject: Confused by the permissions and roles setup
body: I'm setting up Steadfast for our team and the permissions model is really confusing. What's the difference between roles, permission groups, and team permissions? How do they interact? I just want to make sure regular users can see their projects but can't delete anything or access admin settings.
resolution: Explained the permission hierarchy: Roles (global access level) > Permission Groups (feature-level access) > Team Permissions (project-level). For their use case: set regular users as 'Member' role, create a 'Standard User' permission group with create/edit but no delete, and manage project visibility via team settings. Sent KB-1055 permission setup guide.
suspect_reason: A user asking how permissions and roles work is a 'how-to' or 'support' question, not a security incident or security configuration request warranting a 'security' category.

subject: Question about the mobile app features
body: A few of our team members want to use the mobile app. Before we roll it out, can you tell us what features are available on mobile vs desktop? We want to make sure they can at least view tasks, update statuses, and add comments.
resolution: Shared mobile app feature comparison (KB-1070). Mobile supports: task viewing/editing, status updates, comments, file viewing (not upload), notifications, and basic reporting. Not available on mobile: admin settings, integration management, custom field configuration. Apps available on iOS 15+ and Android 12+.

subject: SSO login failing with Okta — SAML assertion error
body: Our users are getting a SAML assertion error when trying to log in via Okta SSO. The error message says 'Invalid SAML Response: assertion signature mismatch'. This started after we renewed our Okta certificate last week. All 200 users are affected.
resolution: The Azure AD SSO integration needed the certificate updated after rotation. Uploaded the new certificate in Admin > Security > SSO > Azure AD Configuration and the SAML validation is passing now. Users should be able to log in normally.

subject: How to configure automated task reminders
body: We want to set up automated reminders for tasks that are approaching their due date. Is there a way to configure this? We'd like reminders at 3 days and 1 day before the due date.
resolution: Automated reminders configurable in Settings > Notifications > Due Date Reminders. Options: 7d, 3d, 1d, same-day, overdue. Can set multiple. Also available per-project in project settings.
suspect_reason: The ticket is about configuring notification/reminder settings, not a performance issue; it should be categorized as 'how-to' or 'configuration', not 'performance'.

subject: CSV export missing from reports page
body: We really need the ability to export our reports as CSV files. Right now the only option is PDF which doesn't work for our data analysis needs. We've been copying data manually into spreadsheets. It would be great if you could add a CSV export button to the reports page. Several people on our team have asked about this.
resolution: Logged as feature request FR-2956. CSV export for reports is planned for Q3. As a workaround, customers can use the API endpoint GET /v2/reports/{id}/data to retrieve raw data in JSON format, which can be converted to CSV. Sent example script.

subject: Would like to connect Steadfast with Monday.com
body: Our partner company uses Monday.com and we need to share project status between our two platforms. Is there a way to connect Steadfast with Monday.com? I didn't see it in the integrations marketplace. We'd need at minimum a way to sync task statuses and due dates.
resolution: Monday.com integration is not currently available. Logged as feature request FR-2963. Recommended using Zapier as a bridge — sent a template Zap that syncs task creation and status changes between Steadfast and Monday.com. Also shared our API documentation for building a custom integration.

subject: Updating our company address in the billing profile
body: We moved offices last month and need to update the billing address on our account. New address is 500 Tech Way, Suite 300, Austin, TX 78701. Also need the address updated on future invoices.
resolution: Updated billing address in Admin > Billing > Company Details. New address will appear on all future invoices. Previous invoices retain the old address (can generate amended versions if needed for accounting). Confirmed change with customer.
suspect_reason: Updating a billing address is a simple administrative change with no financial impact or urgency, making 'high' priority clearly inappropriate.

subject: Data not appearing after Salesforce import
body: We set up the Salesforce integration and ran an initial sync yesterday but none of the contact data has appeared in Steadfast. The integration dashboard shows the sync completed successfully but our contacts list is empty. We have about 5,000 contacts in Salesforce that should have synced.
resolution: The Salesforce sync completed but contacts were imported into a staging area (not the main contacts list). Customer needed to review and approve the import batch in Settings > Integrations > Salesforce > Pending Imports. Guided them through the approval process. All 5,000 contacts now visible.
suspect_reason: The issue was user error/misconfiguration (contacts in a pending approval queue, not a software bug), making 'bug' a clearly incorrect category; 'how-to' or 'user error' would be correct.

subject: Help configuring SSO with our identity provider
body: We just purchased Steadfast and need to set up SSO with our Okta instance before we can start rolling out to users. Our IT team has configured the Okta side but we're not sure what settings to use on the Steadfast side. Can you walk us through the SAML configuration?
resolution: Scheduled onboarding call for SSO setup. Provided SAML configuration details: ACS URL, Entity ID, certificate. Walked through Okta app configuration. SSO successfully tested with 3 pilot users. Sent post-setup verification checklist (KB-1045). Full rollout recommended after 1-week pilot.

subject: Production environment completely down
body: Our entire Steadfast workspace is inaccessible. All 500 users are getting 503 errors. This is our primary project management tool and we have critical deliverables due today. Our operations are at a standstill. Need immediate assistance.
resolution: Critical outage caused by a region-specific AWS availability zone failure affecting the customer's workspace shard. Initiated failover to secondary AZ within 8 minutes. Full service restored in 22 minutes. Sent post-incident report. Discussing multi-region deployment option for their account.
suspect_reason: A complete production outage affecting 500 users with 503 errors is clearly a 'bug' or 'outage' category, not a 'performance' issue.

subject: How to customize the sidebar navigation
body: I find the default sidebar layout a bit confusing. Is it possible to reorder the navigation items or hide sections we don't use? For example, we never use the 'Goals' or 'Wiki' features and they just take up space.
resolution: Sidebar customization available in Settings > Interface > Sidebar. Can reorder, hide, and pin navigation items. Changes are per-user (each team member can customize their own). For workspace-wide defaults: Admin > Interface Defaults. Shared customization guide (KB-1085).
suspect_reason: A cosmetic UI customization question about sidebar navigation is low priority, not high.

subject: How do I change my notification preferences?
body: Quick question — how do I adjust which email notifications I receive? I'm getting too many alerts for things that aren't relevant to me. I looked in settings but couldn't find the notification preferences page.
resolution: Directed to Settings > Notifications > Email Preferences. Walked through the options: can toggle notifications per project, per event type, and set quiet hours. Sent KB-1012 notification management guide.
suspect_reason: A routine question about adjusting notification preferences is low priority, not high.

subject: How to archive completed projects
body: We have about 30 completed projects cluttering our workspace. How do I archive them so they're out of the way but still accessible if we need to reference them later?
resolution: Projects > Select project > Settings > Archive. Archived projects move to the Archive section (sidebar). Still fully searchable and accessible, just hidden from the main view. Can bulk archive: Projects > Select multiple > Actions > Archive. Sent guide on archive management (KB-1075).
suspect_reason: A how-to question about archiving completed projects is a low-priority informational request, not high.

subject: App crashes on mobile when opening projects
body: The Steadfast iOS app crashes immediately when I try to open any project with more than about 50 tasks. It just freezes for a second then goes back to the home screen. I'm on iPhone 15 Pro with the latest app version and iOS 18. This happens every single time, not intermittently.
resolution: Identified a crash caused by the task list component trying to render all tasks at once instead of using lazy loading. The memory usage spike exceeded the iOS app memory limit. Fix deployed in app v2.15.1: implemented virtual scrolling for task lists and reduced initial fetch to 20 tasks with pagination. Crash rate dropped to zero in testing.

subject: Need information about our SLA terms
body: We're doing an internal review of all our vendor SLAs and need detailed information about our current SLA with Steadfast. Specifically: uptime guarantees, response time commitments, penalty clauses for SLA breaches, and the escalation process. Can you send us the full SLA document?
resolution: Sent the Enterprise SLA document (v2024). Key terms: 99.95% uptime guarantee, 15-min response for P1 issues, 2-hour response for P2, service credits for SLA breaches (10% credit per 0.1% below target). Also sent the escalation matrix and quarterly SLA compliance report for their account.

subject: Charged wrong amount after upgrading to Growth plan
body: We upgraded from Starter to Growth last week and our first invoice shows $4,500 instead of the expected $3,200. We have 80 seats at $40/seat/month. The math doesn't add up. Can you explain the charge or issue a correction?
resolution: The tax calculation was applying a 12% rate instead of the correct 8.5% for the customer's jurisdiction. Corrected the tax rate in the billing system and issued a credit of $157.50 for the overcharge. Future invoices will reflect the correct tax rate.

subject: Looking for best practices on task naming conventions
body: Our workspace is getting messy with inconsistent task names. Some people write full sentences, others use abbreviations. We want to establish naming conventions. Do you have any recommended guidelines or examples of how other companies organize this?
resolution: Shared our Task Naming Best Practices guide (KB-1080). Recommended format: [Action verb] + [Object] + [Context]. Examples: 'Design homepage mockup for Q2 launch', 'Fix login timeout on mobile'. Also recommended using task prefixes by type (BUG-, FEAT-, TASK-). Sent 3 customer case studies on workspace organization.
suspect_reason: A request for best practices on task naming conventions is a low-urgency informational question, not critical priority.

subject: Need to update our SSO certificate
body: Our IdP certificate is expiring next week and we need to update it in Steadfast. Last time we did this, SSO broke for a few hours. Can you guide us through the process to minimize disruption?
resolution: Guided through zero-downtime certificate rotation: 1) Upload new cert while keeping old active, 2) Test with admin account, 3) Mark new cert as primary, 4) Remove old cert after 24h. Process completed without any SSO disruption.

subject: Issue with workspace permissions after migration
body: After migrating our workspace to the new region, some team members lost their custom permissions. They can still access the workspace but their project-specific permissions were reset to defaults. Need to restore their access levels.
resolution: Workspace migration preserved role assignments but not project-level custom permissions. Exported the pre-migration permission snapshot and re-applied project permissions. Also filed ENG-4555 to include project permissions in future migrations.

subject: Workspace Blueprint not applying default channels
body: We set up a Workspace Blueprint to auto-configure new department spaces with default channels (#general, #standups, #escalations) but when we create a new space from the Blueprint, the channels aren't being created. The Blueprint preview shows them correctly. We've tried recreating the Blueprint from scratch but same issue. This is blocking our Q2 department expansion.
resolution: Confirmed bug in Blueprint channel provisioning. The channel creation step was failing silently when the creating user didn't have channel-admin permissions in the parent workspace. Fix: Blueprint execution now uses system-level permissions for channel creation. Deployed in v3.15.0. Customer's Blueprint now works correctly.

subject: How do Workspace Blueprints work?
body: We heard about Workspace Blueprints from another Steadfast customer. Can you explain what they are and how to set one up? We want to create a standard project structure that all new teams use when they join our workspace. We're on the Growth plan — is this available to us?
resolution: Explained Workspace Blueprints: templates that define the default structure (spaces, channels, permission groups, workflow rules) applied when creating new organizational units. Available on Growth and Enterprise. Directed to Settings > Workspace > Blueprints. Sent Blueprint setup guide (KB-1095). Recommended starting with a simple Blueprint for one team structure before expanding.

subject: Pulse Check reports showing stale data
body: Our weekly Pulse Check reports are showing data from 2 weeks ago instead of the current week. We depend on Pulse Check for our executive standups every Monday. The timestamp on the report says it was generated Sunday at midnight (correct) but the data inside is from the previous cycle. Other reports generate fine — it's just Pulse Check.
resolution: Pulse Check reports cache the underlying dataset query to reduce load. The cache TTL was set to 14 days instead of 7 days after a config migration. Reset TTL to 7 days for the Pulse Check report type. Manually invalidated the customer's cached report. Next week's Pulse Check will pull fresh data. Filed ENG-4601 to add cache freshness indicator to report headers.

subject: Can we customize the Pulse Check metrics?
body: The default Pulse Check report includes metrics like task velocity and completion rate but we'd like to add custom KPIs — specifically regulatory submission tracking and audit trail completeness. Is it possible to add custom metrics to Pulse Check, or do we need to build a separate report?
resolution: Currently Pulse Check supports only the default metric set (velocity, completion rate, overdue %, active contributors). Custom metrics are on the roadmap (FR-3001). Workaround: create a custom report with the additional KPIs and schedule it to run alongside Pulse Check. Shared our Custom Report Builder guide. Added customer to the Pulse Check customization beta list.

subject: Smart Routing is assigning tickets to the wrong team
body: We enabled Smart Routing last month and initially it was working great — automatically assigning incoming tasks to the right team based on content. But over the past week it's been routing customer-facing tasks to our internal ops team and vice versa. Nothing changed in our routing rules. It's like the model got confused about which team handles what.
resolution: Smart Routing uses a lightweight ML model trained on the customer's historical assignment patterns. The model was retrained on Dec 1 and picked up a batch of mis-routed tasks from November (when a team member was temporarily reassigned) as training data. Rolled back to the previous model version. Added a confidence threshold — assignments below 0.7 confidence go to a review queue instead of auto-routing. Smart Routing now performing correctly.

subject: What is Smart Routing and how do I enable it?
body: I saw a mention of 'Smart Routing' in your changelog but I can't find it anywhere in our workspace settings. What does it do exactly? Is it available on the Starter plan? We're a small team (10 people) and manually assigning tasks is taking up a lot of my time as the team lead.
resolution: Explained Smart Routing: AI-powered automatic task assignment based on historical patterns, team capacity, and task content analysis. Available on Growth and Enterprise plans only — not available on Starter. Recommended upgrade path if interested. For Starter plan: suggested using workflow automation rules for basic auto-assignment based on tags/labels. Sent automation guide (KB-1030).

subject: Cascade permissions not flowing to sub-spaces
body: We set up Cascade permissions on our main Marketing workspace so that permission changes at the top level would automatically flow down to all sub-spaces. But when I add someone to the parent workspace with Editor access, they only get Viewer access in the sub-spaces. The Cascade toggle is ON in workspace settings. Is this a bug or am I misunderstanding how Cascade works?
resolution: Cascade permissions had a known edge case: if a sub-space was created BEFORE Cascade was enabled, it wouldn't retroactively apply the inheritance rules. Only sub-spaces created after enabling Cascade get proper permission flow. Workaround: disable Cascade, re-enable it, then click 'Apply to existing sub-spaces' in the confirmation dialog. This forces a retroactive sync. Filed ENG-4620 to make this automatic.

subject: How does Cascade permission inheritance work?
body: We're reorganizing our workspace hierarchy and considering enabling Cascade permissions. Before we do, can you explain exactly how it works? If I change a user's role at the workspace level, does that automatically update their role in every space, project, and channel below it? What about overrides — can a sub-space have different permissions than the parent?
resolution: Explained Cascade permissions: when enabled, role changes at any level propagate downward to all children. Key details: 1) Propagation is top-down only, 2) Sub-spaces can set explicit overrides that block inheritance for specific users, 3) Cascade respects the 'minimum access' principle — children can grant MORE but not LESS than parent level, 4) Changes propagate within 5 minutes. Sent KB-1098 Cascade Permissions deep-dive guide.
